name: Stratus Sales Support Competitive News, Vol 6 No 3, May 1987 — Tandem Competitive Update (CLX/LXN, VLX, EXT/TXP price cuts)
description: Stratus Sales Support Competitive News, Volume 6 Number 3, May 1987. Editor Peter Kastner (Manager, Sales Support Programs, Marlboro x2192) publishes a detailed competitive analysis of Tandem's April 20 and May 4, 1987 announcements: the new low-end CLX and LXN 'network extender' products, smaller VLX configurations (2- and 3-CPU models at $585K entry), and price cuts across the EXT/TXP line. Kastner also notes Tandem's quiet restatement of ET-1 performance numbers under NonStop SQL (2, 4.5, 6.5 tps/CPU for NS-II/EXT10, TXP/EXT25, VLX) with relaxed 2-second 90th-percentile response time. Contributor Raphael Frommer authored the detailed CLX/LXN technical analysis. The newsletter quotes Omri Serlin (Fault Tolerant Systems Newsletter No. 55, March 16 1987). Signature Kastner quote: 'Business has only two basic functions — marketing and innovation.'

creator.name: Peter S. Kastner, Editor (Manager, Sales Support Programs, Stratus); Raphael Frommer, contributor
